project_context.description: A highly professional, minimal, and lightweight personal portfolio for Avi Bhardwaj, an Engineering Manager at PaisaBazaar with 16+ years of experience.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-zinc-950 leading-tight
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.1em] uppercase text-zinc-500

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 w-full backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-zinc-200
header.layout: flex justify-between items-center h-16 max-w-6xl mx-auto px-6

hero.layout: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-12 items-center min-h-[80vh]
hero.image_column: lg:col-span-5 relative w-full aspect-[4/5] md:aspect-square overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-zinc-200 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-none px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-none px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-colors border border-zinc-200 bg-white hover:bg-zinc-50 hover:text-zinc-900

cards.base: group flex flex-col bg-white border border-zinc-200 p-6 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)]
cards.title: text-xl font-medium text-zinc-950 mb-2

timeline.container: relative border-l border-zinc-200 ml-3 md:ml-6 space-y-12
timeline.node: absolute -left-[5px] top-1.5 h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-blue-600 ring-4 ring-white

skills_bento.item: bg-white border border-zinc-200 p-8 flex flex-col
skills_bento.title: text-lg font-medium text-zinc-950 mb-4
skills_bento.pill: px-3 py-1 bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-700 text-sm border border-zinc-200/50

media.description: Professional headshot for Avi Bhardwaj in the hero section.
Abstract white architectural background. Optional: to be used as a subtle section background if needed with high opacity white overlay.
Clean workspace for portfolio project visual placeholder.
Minimalist computer setup for another portfolio project.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-btn').
Use pure HTML and Tailwind for structural layouts like the Hero, Timeline, and Skills bento grids.
Use standard lucide-react icons for social links (LinkedIn, Email) and UI interactions.
Customize Shadcn components heavily to remove rounded corners (use rounded-none or rounded-sm max) and remove soft drop shadows. Ensure inputs and textareas have crisp border-zinc-200 borders.
Implement the Contact form using Shadcn Input, Textarea, and Button. Provide a mock or actual implementation using a tool like Resend if requested, but ensure the UI handles state (loading, success).

The Work Experience section is critical. Implement a clean, precise vertical timeline matching the 'timeline' component guidelines above. Group roles under 'PaisaBazaar', 'OTS Solutions', 'Vinove', etc.
For the Hero section image, use the provided 'hero_avatar' URL. Do not use an empty div or placeholder text.
Maintain strict left alignment for text content to ensure readability and professional presentation.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards, especially text-zinc-500 against white backgrounds.
